summary: Iteration 324: Growth Engine features verified - Admin Dashboard 9 sections (including A/B Tests and Leaderboard), Public creation page A/B variant text, Remix Variants, Style preview thumbnails, SharePromptModal component. Fixed: ab_testing.py now returns success:true for proper dashboard loading.

minor.issue: WebSocket returns 403 in preview environment (nginx config issue) - falls back to Polling correctly

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed /api/ab/results to return {success: true, experiments: [...]} - was causing 'Failed to load data' in A/B Tests section
All 9 admin dashboard sections present: Executive, Growth Funnel, A/B Tests, Leaderboard, Reliability, Story Intelligence, Revenue, Credits, Conversion
Public creation page correctly renders A/B variant text from experiments (hook_text, cta_copy)
Remix Variants section shows alternative tool options (Comic Book, GIF, Reel Script, Bedtime Story)
Style preset preview thumbnails with gradient backgrounds working in Story Video Studio
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing A/B experiments and creations
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Growth Engine features verified: (1) Admin Dashboard loads all 9 sections including A/B Tests and Leaderboard, (2) A/B Tests section shows 4 experiments with real session data and conversion rates, (3) Leaderboard shows 'A Cat's Big City Adventure' with 9 continuations and 52 views, (4) Public creation page renders A/B variant text dynamically, (5) Remix Variants section shows 4 cross-tool options, (6) Style preview thumbnails working with gradient backgrounds, (7) SharePromptModal.js exists at /app/frontend/src/components/, (8) WebSocket live indicator shows 'Polling' (WS 403 in preview env - expected).

Admin_Dashboard_9_Sections.details: All 9 sections present: Executive, Growth Funnel, A/B Tests, Leaderboard, Reliability, Story Intelligence, Revenue, Credits, Conversion

AB_Tests_Section.details: Shows 4 experiments (cta_copy, hook_text, login_timing, cta_placement) with variants, sessions, and conversion rates. Shows 'Collecting data...' status correctly.

Leaderboard_Section.details: Shows 'Most Continued Stories' with A Cat's Big City Adventure (9 continuations, 52 views), Top Continuers section, metrics (150 Stories Continued, 46.2 Avg Chain Length)

Public_Creation_AB_Variants.details: CTA shows 'Create This in 1 Click' (variant A) and 'Anyone can make this. Click and see.' (hook variant C)

Remix_Variants_Section.details: Shows 4 cross-tool remix options: Comic Book, GIF, Reel Script, Bedtime Story

Style_Preview_Thumbnails.details: 6 style presets with gradient preview thumbnails: 2D Cartoon, Anime, 3D Animation, Watercolor, Comic Book, Claymation

SharePromptModal_Component.details: Component exists at /app/frontend/src/components/SharePromptModal.js with WhatsApp, Twitter, LinkedIn share options

WebSocket_Live_Indicator.details: Shows 'Polling' in admin header (WS connection returns 403 in preview - expected, polling fallback works)

Backend_Lint_public_routes.details: python lint passes for public_routes.py - no F841 unused variable errors
